title: Renewable Pigstep
description: Get Pigstep music discs from Creepers
body:
Renewable Pigstep

Renewable Pigstep music disc drop from Creepers when shot by a Piglin

Features

  • Creepers killed by a Piglin with a crossbow will drop the 'Pigstep' music disc
  • Made in collaboration with Noelle
  • Alternative Download for compatibility with Increased Head Drops
  • Compatible with Minecraft 1.16 and up, last tested on Minecraft 1.19
